title: bauhinia viridescens
intro: Bauhinia viridescens, also known as the Green Bauhinia or Monkey Face Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Bauhinia viridescens plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
